title: einadia nutans subsp. linifolia
intro: Einadia nutans subsp. linifolia, also known as the prickly saltbush, is a shrub native to Australia and a member of the Amaranthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Einadia nutans subsp. linifolia include its ability to support skin health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, teas, or salves, and are often used in traditional Australian medicine to treat various ailments.
